tasks.title: Initialize Vite + React Project
tasks.description: Scaffold a new Vite + React project. Install necessary dependencies including React Router, and set up the basic project structure with src/components, src/sections, and src/assets directories. Configure Vite for optimal development and production builds.
acceptance_criteria: Project structure organized with components, sections, and assets folders
Development server can start without errors

tasks.title: Implement Core Layout and Navigation
tasks.description: Create the main App component with React Router setup. Implement Navbar component with navigation links to all sections. Implement Footer component with copyright and social links. Set up the basic layout structure that will contain all page sections.
acceptance_criteria: App component renders with routing structure

tasks.title: Write Tests for Layout Components
tasks.description: Write unit tests for the Navbar, Footer, and App components. Test navigation functionality, rendering of links, and basic layout structure. Use React Testing Library.
acceptance_criteria: Tests are runnable via npm test

tasks.title: Validate Layout Component Tests
tasks.description: Run the test suite for layout components (Navbar, Footer, App). Verify all tests pass and report any failures.

tasks.title: Implement Home and About Sections
tasks.description: Create the Home section with a hero component displaying name, professional title, summary statement, and CTA button. Create the About section with detailed introduction, background, experience summary, and optional downloadable resume link.
acceptance_criteria: Home section displays hero content correctly

tasks.title: Write Tests for Home and About Sections
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Home and About section components. Test content rendering, CTA button functionality, and resume link behavior.

tasks.title: Validate Home and About Tests
tasks.description: Run the test suite for Home and About sections. Verify all tests pass and report any failures.
acceptance_criteria: All Home and About tests pass

tasks.title: Implement Projects and Skills Sections
tasks.description: Create the Projects section with a list of project cards. Each card should display project title, description, technologies used, live demo link, and GitHub repository link. Create the Skills section displaying technical skills categorized by Frontend, Backend, and Tools.
acceptance_criteria: Projects section displays project cards correctly
Each project card shows all required information

tasks.title: Write Tests for Projects and Skills Sections
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Projects and Skills section components. Test rendering of project data, links, and skills categorization.

tasks.title: Validate Projects and Skills Tests
tasks.description: Run the test suite for Projects and Skills sections. Verify all tests pass and report any failures.
acceptance_criteria: All Projects and Skills tests pass

tasks.title: Implement Contact Section
tasks.description: Create the Contact section with a contact form including fields for Name, Email, and Message. Implement form validation (required fields, email format). Add social media links and email address display. Handle form submission (can use a service like Formspree or implement basic handling).

tasks.title: Write Tests for Contact Section
tasks.description: Write unit tests for the Contact form component. Test form validation, required fields, email format checking, and submission handling.

tasks.title: Validate Contact Section Tests
tasks.description: Run the test suite for the Contact section. Verify all tests pass and report any failures.

tasks.title: Implement Responsive Styling and Accessibility
tasks.description: Implement global styles using CSS or Tailwind CSS. Ensure the website is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports. Apply modern, clean UI/UX design. Ensure semantic HTML structure and add ARIA labels where needed for accessibility. Optimize for fast loading performance.
acceptance_criteria: Styles applied consistently across all components
Website is responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop

tasks.title: Write Tests for Responsiveness and Accessibility
tasks.description: Write tests to verify responsive behavior and accessibility features. Test viewport changes, semantic HTML structure, and ARIA labels.

tasks.title: Validate Styling and Accessibility Tests
tasks.description: Run the test suite for styling, responsiveness, and accessibility. Verify all tests pass and report any failures.
acceptance_criteria: All styling and accessibility tests pass

tasks.title: Runtime Browser Verification
tasks.description: Start the Vite development server and perform runtime browser verification. Verify all sections render correctly, navigation works, forms function properly, links are valid, and the site is responsive. Take screenshots to validate the visual appearance.
acceptance_criteria: All links are valid and clickable
Responsive design works on different viewport sizes

tasks.title: Commit Portfolio Website
tasks.description: Create a git commit with all changes for the portfolio website. Use a descriptive commit message that summarizes the complete implementation of the portfolio site with all sections.
acceptance_criteria: Commit message is descriptive and follows conventions
